title: ValidationVerdict
description: V's emitted verdict. See src/packages/cnos.cdd/skills/cdd/RECEIPT-VALIDATION.md §Validation Interface and schemas/cdd/boundary_decision.cue #ValidationVerdict. This JSON Schema types V's machine-readable JSON output (delta-side consumers parse this). The receipt's stored `validation.verdict` block (typed by the CUE #ValidationVerdict) is a structurally compatible subset; V's JSON adds richer failed_predicates entries.

result.description: Headline V verdict. PASS = every contract+evidence predicate held. FAIL = at least one did not hold.

failed_predicates.description: Structured list of predicates that did not hold. Empty iff result == PASS.

evidence_ref.description: Optional pointer into the receipt or evidence graph naming where the predicate failed.

diagnostic.description: Human-readable diagnostic. For CUE failures, the verbatim cue vet stderr line. For counterfeit-rule failures, a templated message naming the rule and the offending value.

warnings.description: Advisory observations the contract permits without failing PASS.

provenance.description: Who emitted the verdict, against which inputs, at what time. Per RECEIPT-VALIDATION.md §Output contract.

validator_identity.description: Canonical capability name. Pinned to 'cnos.cdd.validate_receipt' per RECEIPT-VALIDATION.md illustrative example.
